#!/usr/bin/env python3
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
from torch_geometric.nn import GCNConv

class SpatioTemporalGCN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dim=1, hidden_dim=64, output_dim=1, num_nodes=207, num_layers=2, seq_len=12):
        super(SpatioTemporalGCN, self).__init__()
        
        self.num_nodes = num_nodes
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim
        self.seq_len = seq_len
        
        # Input embedding layer
        self.input_proj = nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        # Multiple GCN layers for spatial processing
        self.gcn_layers = nn.ModuleList([
            GCNConv(hidden_dim, hidden_dim) for _ in range(num_layers)
        ])
        
        # LSTM for temporal processing
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, batch_first=True)
        
        # Output projection
        self.output_proj = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, output_dim)
        
    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_weight):
        # x shape: (batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes)
        batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes = x.shape
        
        # Process each time step through spatial GCN
        outputs = []
        for t in range(seq_len):
            # Get features for all nodes at time t
            x_t = x[:, t, :]  # (batch_size, num_nodes)
            
            # Add feature dimension
            x_t = x_t.unsqueeze(-1)  # (batch_size, num_nodes, 1)
            
            # Project to hidden dimension
            x_t = self.input_proj(x_t)  # (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim)
            
            # Reshape for GCN: (batch_size * num_nodes, hidden_dim)
            x_t = x_t.view(-1, self.hidden_dim)
            
            # Apply GCN layers
            gcn_out = x_t
            for gcn_layer in self.gcn_layers:
                gcn_out = gcn_layer(gcn_out, edge_index, edge_weight)
                gcn_out = F.relu(gcn_out)
            
            # Reshape back: (batch_size, num_nodes, hidden_dim)
            gcn_out = gcn_out.view(batch_size, num_nodes, self.hidden_dim)
            
            # Average across nodes to get temporal features
            temporal_features = gcn_out.mean(dim=1)  # (batch_size, hidden_dim)
            outputs.append(temporal_features)
        
        # Stack temporal features
        temporal_seq = torch.stack(outputs, dim=1)  # (batch_size, seq_len, hidden_dim)
        
        # Apply LSTM
        lstm_out, _ = self.lstm(temporal_seq)  # (batch_size, seq_len, hidden_dim)
        
        # Project to output dimension
        output = self.output_proj(lstm_out)  # (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim)
        
        # Expand to match number of nodes
        output = output.expand(-1, -1, self.num_nodes)  # (batch_size, seq_len, num_nodes)
        
        return output
